access_log.help: Enable access logging for the selected runtime profile.

activate.help: Mark a generated or imported key active immediately.

baseline_file.help: Optional explicit baseline artifact for diff operations.

check.help: Validate the selected runner profile and application factory without launching runtime.

checksum.help: Expected checksum or checksum algorithm for import/export validation.

cookies.help: Enable cookie/session helpers in serve plans.

db_safe_start.help: Require a safe database start posture.

dry_run.help: Resolve and emit the runtime plan without applying or launching state changes.

enable_mtls.help: Enable mTLS slice for the serve plan.

env_file.help: Optional environment file loaded before resolution.

extension.help: Extension boundary slice. May be supplied multiple times.

filter.help: Simple substring filter applied to identifiers or names.

from_file.help: Load mutation input from a JSON or YAML file.

health.help: Enable health endpoints in serve plans.

id.help: Primary identifier for a single record.

if_exists.help: Behavior when the target already exists.

if_missing.help: Behavior when the target does not already exist.

include_secrets.help: Include secret material where the selected surface permits it.

input_path.help: Input path for import, validation, or diff operations.

issuer.help: Issuer override for discovery and contract generation.

limit.help: Maximum number of results to return.

log_level.help: Operator log level for serve plans.

name.help: Optional named release gate or artifact selector.

no_strict.help: Downgrade failures to warnings for exploratory use.

offline.help: Avoid network or external peer execution assumptions.

peer_profile.help: Peer profile selector. May be supplied multiple times.

pid_file.help: Optional PID file written for the launched runtime.

publish.help: Publish JWKS after a successful key mutation.

redact.help: Redact secret material from exported output.

require_tls.help: Require TLS on the public plane.

retire_after.help: Retire-after hint or timestamp recorded with the key.

runtime_style.help: Runtime style for installation or standalone serving.

server.help: Runner profile used to qualify and launch runtime.

set_item.help: Inline mutation field assignment in key=value form. May be supplied multiple times.

signing_key.help: Optional Ed25519 private signing key path or seed.

slice.help: Protocol slice. May be supplied multiple times.

strict.help: Fail closed when governance or certification checks fail.

surface_set.help: Installable surface set. May be supplied multiple times.

timeout.help: Maximum wait time in seconds for supported long-running operations.

verbose.help: Increase operator verbosity; may be repeated.

wait.help: Wait for completion when the operation supports asynchronous execution.

workers.help: Process count for the selected runtime profile.

global_flags.help: Optional environment file loaded before resolution.
Issuer override for discovery and contract generation.
